ciliary_role: Nubp1 and Nubp2 interact with each other, but their individual knockdown, however, has differential effects on centrosome and spindle formation: while Nubp1 silencing qualitatively phenocopies KIFC5A silencing, also resulting in significant centrosome amplification throughout the cell cycle and the formation of multipolar spindles, Nubp2 appears to have a modulatory/accessory role for centriole arithmetics, in concert with KIFC5A and Nubp1 [16638812]. Nubp1 and Nubp2 localize on interphase centrioles in cycling cells and basal bodies in quiescent cells(23807208).
